channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: If you invested in Apple’s IPO 44 years ago, here’s what your shares would be worth today
item.description: On December 12, 1980, a few hours after the opening bell rang on Wall Street, shares of Apple Computer officially began trading. The numbers, by today’s standards, weren’t that impressive.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: High-speed NBN plans have never been this cheap – or fast
item.description: High-speed NBN plans are getting increasingly faster and increasingly cheaper. This is why you should consider making the upgrade at home.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump’s pick of David Sacks as AI and crypto czar shows how cozy his White House will be with Silicon Valley
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s approach to crypto is becoming clearer with the appointment of entrepreneur David Sacks as Trump’s “White House A.I. & Crypto Czar”—signaling a shift in how the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Why OpenAI’s Sora has so much trouble depicting gymnasts
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Refurbished Steam Deck OLEDs are now almost as cheap as new LCD models – good luck finding one though
item.description: Ignoring the Steam Deck OLED isn't much of an option now, because the refurbished models are almost as cheap as new LCD models.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DOJ asks court to reject TikTok bid to block ban
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) asked a federal appeals court Wednesday to reject TikTok’s bid to put a law that could ban the app on hold while it appeals to the Supreme Court. The law, which requires TikTok’s parent company ByteDance to divest from the app or face a ban on Jan.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Meta donated $1M to Trump inaugural fund after Zuckerberg met with president-elect
item.description: Meta donated $1 million to President-elect Trump's inaugural fund, the company confirmed to The Hill on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Kazakhstan's Groundbreaking "Carpet CCTV" Project: Revolutionizing Public Safety with Advanced Surveillance and AI
item.description: Discover how Kazakhstan's Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way in public safety with its ambitious 'Carpet CCTV' project, combining surveillance networks with advanced analytics and artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to protect your communications through encryption
item.description: Cyber officials are advising people to use encryption in their communications after a sprawling hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity responses
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, the more data you have, the easier it is to identify anomalies and stop adversaries. The post Dashboards, sharing threat intelligence help USDA improve cybersecurity responses first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Southern California Companies Look to Future with Hopeful Eye
item.description: As a new administration takes office, Southern California companies are looking ahead with optimism, discussing ways to cut waste in government agencies and strengthen the country with a more targeted military.
item.dc:creator: Erika I. Ritchie, The Mercury News

item.title: The makers and takers of WordPress
item.description: The idea of open-source software seems kind of nuts. Millions (billions?) of lines of code doing all kinds of amazing things and available for free? That sounds too good to be true. But it is true.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft to launch zero water consumption cooling for future data centers
item.description: Microsoft has introduced a new design for data centers to optimize artificial intelligence (AI) workloads, implementing a cooling system that it claims will consume zero water.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nokia Expands Data Center Fabric Package to Support Open-Source SONiC
item.description: Nokia offers customers an alternative way to set up data center networks by expanding its data center fabric package to support open-source Software for Open Networking in the Cloud (SONiC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to delete multiple emails at once on iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson shows iPhone users how to easily delete multiple emails and manage their inboxes to reduce digital clutter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Why business teams must stay out of application development
item.description: In the last 10 years of building WaveMaker, the one thing we always hear are user expectations that low code will miraculously allow business users to develop feature-rich applications. Well, it can, but it most certainly shouldn’t. I’ll tell you why.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4
